phase3_session_1_fingerprint_note: Verified clean: fingerprint --verify --check-broker passed before session, frozen hashes matched, working tree clean, 0 open orders, 0 open positions at start and shutdown.

phase3_fingerprint._note: Frozen at Phase 3 readiness commit. SHA check uses CAPTURE_AFTER_PUSH sentinel: a committed file cannot contain the SHA of the commit that holds it (self-referential hash). Integrity is enforced by the four file hashes below plus clean working tree. Record the frozen commit SHA via: git tag phase3-baseline && git push origin phase3-baseline. Regenerate hashes with: python scripts/capture_session_fingerprint.py. A session whose runtime fingerprint diverges from this baseline is NOT eligible for the Phase 3 clean cohort without a declared protocol amendment.

_broker_hash_amendment.reason: 11 defect fixes applied between Session 1 and Session 2 (commit 37f8f1a). alpaca_broker.py changed for Fix 10: option quote timestamp now parsed from exchange latestQuote.t instead of datetime.utcnow(). No threshold, parameter, or strategy logic changes. Other behavioral fixes (RVOL pace projection, EOD entry cutoff, signal age gate, scanner direction match, exit bid pricing, ORB unified definition, delta hard rejection, IV filter dead code, ledger breakeven/profit-factor/delta-bucket, replay fixed strike, VWAP lookahead, backtest EOD exit) are all defect corrections. Session 1 was valid under the then-current baseline. Sessions 2+ run under this updated baseline. Cross-session comparison should note the code boundary at S1/S2.

note: Phase 3 cohort. All sessions on or after 2026-07-12 with all P1-P7 fixes applied. Pre-phase-3 sessions (P1/P2 phases) are engineering evidence only — see evaluation/ledger.json contamination_flags.

phase3_sessions.contamination_note: Both fills recovered via reconciler (stale-cancel pattern): PLTR limit order filled just before 5-min cancel window; XLE limit order filled just before cancel (422 response). Broker-reported fill prices are authoritative. Session ended clean: 0 positions, 0 orders, api_errors=0. Reconciler warning 'PM has PLTR but broker does not' is a timing artifact — PLTR had been sold at broker before PM processed closure. Not a data integrity issue.

fill_detail.note: Position unmanaged in reconciler blind window ~10:57-11:07 ET (broker fill to local restore); peak tracking began at restore, so trailing stop reference may understate true peak. First case where stale-cancel window plausibly affected exit quality.

exploration_segment.note: ENGINEERING DATA ONLY — excluded from Phase 3 cohort. After the 3-trade clean segment completed (+$106, clean shutdown 11:37 ET), user requested max_trades_per_day lifted 3->6 for remainder of day. Config edited as uncommitted working-tree change, runner restarted 11:38 ET (log: session_2026-07-15_exploration.log). Counters correctly restored from DB (entries=3, pnl=+106). No additional trades: EOD 30-min entry cutoff closed the window at ~11:59 ET. Clean shutdown 12:34 ET, 0 trades, 0 positions. Config reverted to max_trades_per_day=3 after shutdown; never committed.

cumulative.note: Phase 3 clean cohort only. Sessions 1-3. Code boundary at S1/S2: 11 defect fixes applied. S3 exploration segment (0 trades) excluded.

minimum_observations.note: 6 trades recorded. strategy (3/3), universe_group (2/4), fill_path (5/1) now at or past 3-obs minimum for at least one bucket.

Q1_orb_vs_vwap.note: ORB: 3 trades, +$66 net (1W/2L — the win was +$83 PLTR; S3 losses small). VWAP: 3 trades, +$111 net (1W/2L — the win was +$123 TSLA). Both profitable on N=3; winners driven by single large wins in each. No separation yet.

Q3_dte.note: DTE 3-4: 3 trades +$71. DTE 0-2: 3 trades +$106 (both 0-DTE trades in S3: +$123 TSLA, -$8 IWM). 0-DTE shows expected high variance.

Q4_etf_vs_single_stock.note: ETF: 2 trades -$9 (XLE, IWM). Single stock: 4 trades +$186. ETF bucket still below 3-obs minimum.

Q7_fill_path.note: reconciler_recovery: 5 trades +$178; direct: 1 trade -$1. Stale-cancel is now the DOMINANT fill path (5 of 6 trades, 5-for-5 on mid-session limit entries S2+S3) — systematic defect, see open_issues.

open_issues.description: ALL 5 mid-session limit entries across S2+S3 filled just before the 5-minute stale-cancel timer fired (S2: PLTR, XLE; S3: RIVN, TSLA, IWM — 5-for-5, fully systematic). The reconciler recovers correctly every time, but each occurrence creates a 10-15 min unmanaged blind window between broker fill and local restore. In S3 the IWM position's peak-price tracking for the trailing stop only began at restore, so the stale-cancel window plausibly degraded exit quality for the first time (not just entry bookkeeping). Severity raised medium->high. Fix options: extend entry_order_timeout_secs to 10-15 min, or trigger immediate reconciler check on 422 cancel response.

Observability only, no trading impact. (1) on_fill events not emitted for reconciler-recovered entries — the diff detection only wraps fill_tracker.poll, and all S3 entries arrived via reconciler restore, so no fill push events fired. (2) on_exit reports last cached price/limit instead of broker-confirmed fill (RIVN pushed -$10 @ 0.16, actual -$9 @ 0.17; IWM pushed -$10 @ 0.22, actual -$8 @ 0.24). (3) session_end trades count showed 0 after restart because exits_today is not restored by restore_daily_counters.
